summary: Completed testing of TC Pro Dojo new features: 1) coaches_page_photo Site Setting for Success/Coaches page, and 2) 12-photo grid on Training page from Media gallery. All backend APIs pass (20/20 tests). Frontend features work correctly with proper conditional rendering based on data availability.
critical_code_review_comments: Training.js correctly filters media by mediaType='photo' and limits to 12 items (.slice(0, 12))
Pros.js properly conditionally renders coaches_page_photo only when siteSettings.coaches_page_photo exists
AdminSiteSettings.js includes coaches_page_photo in predefinedSettings array with correct data-testid
All required data-testid attributes are present for testing (training-photo-grid, training-grid-photo-{n}, coaches-page-photo, cta-training-button, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Created test data via API: 5 TEST_ photo media items and 1 coaches_page_photo site setting. All test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features tested and working: 1) Site Settings coaches_page_photo preset appears in admin /admin/site-settings page Quick Add section, and when created shows on /success page above CTA button. 2) Media gallery photos (mediaType='photo') appear in 12-photo responsive grid on /training page above 'How It Works' section. Both features gracefully handle empty states (no data = no UI element shown, no errors).

coaches_page_photo_site_setting.admin_page: Quick-add preset visible at /admin/site-settings with correct data-testid='quick-add-coaches_page_photo'
coaches_page_photo_site_setting.api_crud: All CRUD operations working via /api/admin/site-settings and /api/site-settings
coaches_page_photo_site_setting.frontend_display: Photo renders on /success page above CTA with data-testid='coaches-page-photo'
coaches_page_photo_site_setting.empty_state: No error when setting doesn't exist - section just not rendered

training_page_photo_grid.admin_api: Photos can be created via /api/admin/media with mediaType='photo'
training_page_photo_grid.public_api: /api/media returns all media items, frontend filters for photos
training_page_photo_grid.frontend_display: Grid renders with data-testid='training-photo-grid' using responsive columns (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4)
training_page_photo_grid.12_photo_limit: Frontend correctly limits to 12 photos with .slice(0, 12)
training_page_photo_grid.empty_state: No error when no photos exist - grid just not rendered
